description: MCP-style tool manifest for the Campus Lost & Found /api/ai/assist endpoint.

tools.name: search_listings
tools.description: Search for lost or found item listings on campus. Supports optional filtering by item type and free-text search across title, description, category, and location.

search.description: Free-text search across title, description, category, and location.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Defaults to 1.

limit.description: Number of results per page. Defaults to 9.

tools.name: get_listing
tools.description: Retrieve a single lost or found listing by its unique identifier.

id.description: The UUID of the listing to retrieve.

tools.name: get_monthly_report
tools.description: Get a summary report of lost and found listings for a given month and year.

month.description: The month as a number from 1 (January) to 12 (December).

tools.name: get_trends
tools.description: Get statistics and trends for lost and found items over a recent time period.

days.description: Number of days to look back. Defaults to 30.
